t43_header: #: description: The measured differential cross section in the $50 \le M_{ll} < 76$ GeV mass window, in bins of the $\varphi^*$ variable, divided by the measured differential cross section in the $76 \le M_{ll} < 106$ GeV mass window. At least one jet is required. The values are not normalized by the bin width.

t44_header: #: name: Covariance matrices for phistar mass 50-76 over mass 76-106

#: description: The measured differential cross section in the $50 \le M_{ll} < 76$ GeV mass window, in bins of the $\varphi^*$ variable, divided by the measured differential cross section in the $76 \le M_{ll} < 106$ GeV mass window. At least one jet is required. The values are not normalized by the bin width. This entry contains the covariance matrix of the results.
#: keyword reactions: P P --> GAMMA* --> LEPTON+ LEPTON- | P P --> GAMMA* --> E+ E- | P P --> GAMMA* --> MU+ MU- | P P --> Z --> LEPTON+ LEPTON- | P P --> Z --> E+ E- | P P --> Z --> MU+ MU-
#: keyword phrases: Cross Section | Single Differential Cross Section | Drell Yan | Z Production | Di-Muon Production | Transverse Momentum Dependence
